name: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a communication to a cryptocurrency mining host is detected.

Note: Populate the Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts with relevant URLs.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
when any of URL Host (custom), URL (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
AND when any of URL Host (custom), URL (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Hosts - AlphaNumeric
